tluaTableNoMethods.tlua(5,17): error TS1005: ',' expected.
tluaTableNoMethods.tlua(5,17): error TS2304: Cannot find name 'p'.
tluaTableNoMethods.tlua(5,19): error TS2304: Cannot find name 'v'.

tluaTableNoMethods.tlua(5,22): error TS2693: 'number' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
tluaTableNoMethods.tlua(5,30): error TS1005: ',' expected.


==== tluaTableNoMethods.tlua (15 errors) ====
    // Object-literal methods and accessors are removed: they decompose into
    // positional expressions with natural errors.
    local m = { m() { return 1; } };
                ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'm'.
                    ~
!!! error TS1005: ',' expected.
                      ~~~~~~
!!! error TS1109: Expression expected.
    local g = { get p() { return 1; } };
                ~~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'get'.
                    ~
!!! error TS1005: ',' expected.
                    ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'p'.
                        ~
!!! error TS1005: ',' expected.
                          ~~~~~~
!!! error TS1109: Expression expected.
    local s = { set p(v: number) { } };
                ~~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'set'.
                    ~
!!! error TS1005: ',' expected.
                    ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'p'.
                      ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'v'.
                       ~
!!! error TS1005: ',' expected.
                         ~~~~~~
!!! error TS2693: 'number' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
                                 ~
!!! error TS1005: ',' expected.
    
    // The replacement: functions are table values.
    local fns = { run = function(): number return 1; end };
    local one: number = fns.run();
    
    // Literal string/number keys use the bracket form.
    local keyed = { [1] = "a", ["k"] = 2 };
    local ka: string = keyed[1];
    local kk: number = keyed.k;
